title: Bond Traders Are Betting on Fed Rate Cuts Spilling Into 2027
description: Traders in US futures and options markets are piling on bets that the Federal Reserve will continue cutting rates into next year instead of raising them.
content: Traders in US futures and options markets are piling on bets that the Federal Reserve will continue cutting rates into next year instead of raising them.
